patch.value: CONTEXT: combining semantic+keyword scores; alternatives were RRF, learning-to-rank, score concatenation. DECISION: linear interpolation score = semantic_norm*w + keyword_norm*(1-w) with single configurable search.hybrid_semantic_weight (default 0.7); both normalized to [0,1]. CONSEQUENCES: simple/deterministic/transparent, single tuning knob, no training data; weight is global-only (per-query override proposed pm-cy8i); keyword normalization is corpus-relative. EVIDENCE: src/cli/commands/search.ts; item pm-cwp; PRD 13.3.
ADR: Hybrid search = normalized linear interpolation with a configurable weight
Hybrid search = normalized linear interpolation with a configurable weight
